title: Approve rank-drop UI change shipped under ADR-0001 (Task 4)
description: The test harness and all unit tests are implemented and green. One change alters rendered UI: KeywordTable.tsx now renders rank drops (now>prev) as '↓ N' in text-danger instead of '—' (which previously collapsed drops into no-change). This is a correctness fix. No drop row exists in current mock data, so there is no visible change today, but the rendered-output behavior is new. Separately, format.ts NaN behavior ($NaN / NaN% leaking to UI) was deliberately pinned, not guarded — flagging in case product wants a display guard.

title: Approve rank-drop UI change landed under ADR-0001 (branch dev-clone/adr-0001-test-harness)
description: ADR-0001 implementation is committed and green (27/27, tsc clean) on branch dev-clone/adr-0001-test-harness, commit a045f2c. One change alters rendered UI: KeywordTable now renders rank drops (now>prev) as '↓ N' in text-danger instead of '—'. This is a correctness fix; no down-move row exists in current mock data, so no visible change today, but rendered-output behavior is new. Separately, format.ts NaN behavior ($NaN/NaN% leaking to UI) was deliberately pinned, not guarded — flagging in case product wants a display guard.

title: Code Review verdict: APPROVE — ADR-0001 (cr-f1 resolved; 3 latent follow-ups)
description: Re-review at commit a045f2c. The gating rank-drop defect (cr-f1) is fixed and covered by tests; 27/27 green, tsc clean, verified independently. Verdict is APPROVE. Three remaining items live in format.ts, which this changeset did not touch — they're pre-existing, have zero call sites, and the NaN behavior is intentionally pinned in tests. Carry them as follow-up backlog before format funcs are wired to live data.

title: Security re-scan — 2 Medium findings STILL OPEN (local-seo-agency)
description: Re-scan at commit a045f2c confirms both prior Medium findings remain unremediated (no overrides block, page.tsx markup unchanged). No new security issues. Decide whether to fix now or accept the latent risk. New @google/generative-ai dep is currently unused — no finding yet, but flag for a scan when wired up.

title: Approve README edits for v0.2.2 docs sync
description: Two scoped README.md edits made to match shipped v0.2.2 code: (1) added 'npm test' row to the Scripts table; (2) added 'rank.ts — Pure rank-delta logic' to the project-structure tree. CHANGELOG [0.2.2] was pre-authored by the Release Manager and left unchanged. Total: +2 lines, no code touched.
